2604.12471.title: Beyond Single-Dimension Novelty: How Combinations of Theory, Method, and Results-based Novelty Shape Scientific Impact
2604.12471.paper_summary: Scientific novelty drives advances at the research frontier, yet it is also associated with heightened uncertainty and potential resistance from incumbent paradigms, leading to complex patterns of scientific impact. Prior studies have primarily ex-amined the relationship between a single dimension of novelty -- such as theoreti-cal, methodological, or results-based novelty -- and scientific impact. However, because scientific novelty is inherently multidimensional, focusing on isolated dimensions may obscure how different types of novelty jointly shape impact. Consequently, we know little about how combinations of novelty types influence scientific impact. To this end, we draw on a dataset of 15,322 articles published in Nature Communications. Using the DeepSeek-V3 model, we classify articles into three novelty dimensions based on the content of their Introduction sections: theoretical novelty, methodological novelty, and results-based novelty. These dimensions may coexist within the same article, forming distinct novelty configura-tions. Scientific impact is measured using five-year citation counts and indicators of whether an article belongs to the top 1% or top 10% highly cited papers. Descriptive results indicate that results-based novelty alone and the simultaneous presence of all three novelty types are the dominant configurations in the sample. Regression results further show that articles with results-based novelty only re-ceive significantly more citations and are more likely to rank among the top 1% and top 10% highly cited papers than articles exhibiting all three novelty types. These findings advance our understanding of how multidimensional novelty configurations shape knowledge diffusion.
2604.12471.paper_summary_zh: 科學新穎性推動了研究前沿的進展，但它也與更高的不確定性和現有範式的潛在抵抗相關，導致科學影響的複雜模式。先前的研究主要檢視了新穎性的單一維度之間的關係——例如理論性、新方法或基於結果的新穎性——與科學影響的關係。然而，由於科學新穎性本質上是多維的，專注於孤立的維度可能會掩蓋不同類型的新穎性如何共同塑造影響。因此，我們對新穎性類型的組合如何影響科學影響知之甚少。為此，我們利用了一個包含15,322篇發表於《自然通訊》的文章數據集。使用DeepSeek-V3模型，我們根據引言部分的內容將文章分類為三個新穎性維度：理論新穎性、方法學新穎性和基於結果的新穎性。這些維度可能在同一篇文章中共存，形成不同的新穎性配置。科學影響通過五年引用次數和文章是否屬於前1%或前10%的高被引論文的指標來衡量。描述性結果顯示，僅基於結果的新穎性以及所有三種類型的新穎性同時存在是樣本中的主導配置。回歸結果進一步顯示，僅具有基於結果的新穎性的文章獲得的引用次數顯著更多，且更可能排名於前1%和前10%的高被引論文中，與展示所有三種類型的新穎性的文章相比。這些發現增進了我們對多維新穎性配置如何塑造知識擴散的理解。
2604.12471.author: Yi Zhao et.al.
2604.12471.authors: Yi Zhao, Yang Chenggang, Yuzhuo Wang, Tong Bao, Zhang Heng, Chengzhi Zhang
